missionFrame.function: Advance the open-world recovery campaign through an authored tactical case.
missionFrame.dramaticQuestion: Who decides whether returning passengers go home when home now treats their survival as a threat?

forbiddenOutcomes: end Black Current from a single failed check
remove player agency from command decisions
resolve Project Mooring without authored evidence

phases.title: Forty-Seven Hours
phases.summary: A civilian transport emerges believing it is less than two days late and requesting clearance to continue to its destination colony.
phases.directorPurpose: A civilian transport emerges believing it is less than two days late and requesting clearance to continue to its destination colony.

phases.title: A Changed Home
phases.summary: The destination colony confirms a coup, new law, and extradition demands for several passengers.
pressures: The new government has legitimate support
Families on the colony are requesting contact
phases.directorPurpose: The destination colony confirms a coup, new law, and extradition demands for several passengers.

phases.title: Cargo and Evidence
phases.summary: The transport's medical cargo, passenger property, and current logs become separate contested objects.
pressures: Both old and new authorities claim cargo
phases.directorPurpose: The transport's medical cargo, passenger property, and current logs become separate contested objects.

phases.title: Individual Dispositions
phases.summary: Command commits return, asylum, housing, cargo, and evidence arrangements without treating the passenger list as one legal object.
phases.directorPurpose: Command commits return, asylum, housing, cargo, and evidence arrangements without treating the passenger list as one legal object.

facts.summary: Director card card.quest.chapter-2-forty-seven-hours-late is relevant during Forty-Seven Hours.
Director card card.director.survivor-dignity is relevant during Forty-Seven Hours.

Director card card.actor.maia-rinn is relevant during A Changed Home.
Director card card.location.ternion-relay is relevant during Cargo and Evidence.
Director card card.actor.magistrate-orrel is relevant during Cargo and Evidence.
Director card card.command.player-agency is relevant during Individual Dispositions.
Director card card.director.failure-forward is relevant during Individual Dispositions.

clocks.label: Chapter 2: Forty-Seven Hours Late Pressure
advanceTriggers: Delay, unresolved hazards, or escalating faction action.

pressures.label: The new colonial government demands extradition of the former governor aboard the transport.

decisionPoints.title: Colony Contact
decisionPoints.prompt: How will the Serein contact the changed colony and protect passengers who do not consent to disclosure or return?
decisionPoints.stakes: Asylum; Family contact; Diplomatic relations; Passenger safety
decisionPoints.optionsPolicy: Freeform command intent; listed options are examples only.

decisionPoints.title: Cargo Status
decisionPoints.prompt: What temporary custody applies to the medical cargo and property while passenger status remains divided?
decisionPoints.stakes: Medical relief; Property rights; Claims legitimacy
decisionPoints.optionsPolicy: Freeform command intent; listed options are examples only.

commandDecisions.title: Colony Contact
commandDecisions.awardPolicy: Award when the player makes a clear, costly command judgment about colony contact.

commandDecisions.title: Cargo Status
commandDecisions.awardPolicy: Award when the player makes a clear, costly command judgment about cargo status.
